news.headline: China’s motorsports industry continues to rev up with country’s first race-grade fuel
news.summary:
China’s first domestically developed fuel designed for motor racing has made its debut at a rally in the western deserts in what state media hailed as a milestone for the country’s oil refining industry.

news.headline: Hong Kong High Court to hear Evergrande liquidators’ lawsuit against PwC on Monday
news.summary:
The liquidators of China Evergrande Group’s lawsuit against PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) International will have their case heard in the Hong Kong High Court on Monday, according to records posted on the judiciary’s website.
The one-day hearing was scheduled before Deputy Judge Patrick Fung Pak-tung

news.headline: 15,000 flowers a day: Behind the scenes at the Carlton Cannes
news.summary: Using between 10,000 and 15,000 flowers a day to transform every space inside the Carlton Cannes: this is the world of floral designer Djordje Varda, who takes us behind the scenes of his extraordinary daily routine 💐
